channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: School communities criticise Senate following coup attempt and shooting incident
item.description: School communities from several major Philippine educational institutions expressed strong criticism toward the Senate in the aftermath of a reported coup attempt and shooting incident. According to t...

item.title: Liverpool to Begin Formal Negotiations with Andoni Iraola for Head Coach Role
item.description: Liverpool don finally move to start proper talks with Andoni Iraola as dem dey find new head coach after dem sack Arne Slot. Dem release Slot last Saturday, just one year after e lead Liverpool to win...

item.title: Israeli Military Advances in Southern Lebanon Amid Tensions with Hezbollah and Iran
item.description: Israeli forces have launched their deepest incursion into southern Lebanon in over 25 years, despite a U.S.-brokered ceasefire and ongoing diplomatic talks with Lebanon. The operation targets the Iran...

item.title: Islamabad announces revised business hours to save energy amid fuel shortages
item.description: In Islamabad, the Capital Territory Administration has implemented new energy-saving measures due to rising fuel prices and supply issues caused by the US-Iran conflict. Starting 1 June 2026, all majo...

item.title: Adebayo and Morka Clash Over Tinubu Government’s Economic Performance
item.description: For this report, serious political argument show between SDP presidential candidate Adewole Adebayo and APC spokesperson Felix Morka over how President Bola Tinubu government don perform since 2023. A...

item.title: Report claims proposed government-wide NDA could restrict whistleblower protections in Trump administration
item.description: The article discusses concerns raised by the Freedom of the Press Foundation regarding a reported plan by the Trump administration to implement a broad, government-wide nondisclosure agreement (NDA) f...

item.title: TCRA launches Season II of Samia Kalamu Awards to recognise excellence in journalism
item.description: The Tanzania Communications Regulatory Authority (TCRA) has officially launched Season Two of the Samia Kalamu Awards in Dar es Salaam, an initiative aimed at strengthening journalism standards and re...

item.title: Bezzecchi wins Italian GP at Mugello as Aprilia disrupt Ducati centenary celebrations
item.description: Marco Bezzecchi delivered a standout performance at the Italian Grand Prix at Mugello, taking victory and spoiling Ducati’s centenary celebrations on home soil. Riding for Aprilia, Bezzecchi claimed h...

item.title: Federal judge reopens inquiry into Trump's DOJ fund settlement amid potential misconduct concerns
item.description: A federal judge in Florida, Kathleen Williams, has reopened a lawsuit regarding President Donald Trump's nearly $1.8 billion 'anti-weaponization' fund, raising significant legal questions. The inquiry...

item.title: DA lays criminal charges over alleged Ekurhuleni tender irregularities linked to luxury jet trip
item.description: The Democratic Alliance (DA) has announced that it will open criminal charges against former Ekurhuleni City Manager Dr Imogen Mashazi and businessman Ze Nxumalo, following allegations of irregulariti...

item.title: Tragic sea rescue attempt: woman dies and man critically injured while saving dog
item.description: A tragic incident occurred in Thornton Cleveleys, Lancashire, when a woman in her 60s lost her life and a man of a similar age remains in critical condition after entering the sea to rescue their pet ...

item.title: DSS arrests arms couriers linked to Papiri school abduction in Niger State
item.description: The Department of State Services (DSS) has arrested five suspects believed to be involved in supplying arms to the gunmen who carried out the mass abduction at St Mary’s Catholic School in Papiri vill...

item.title: Popovic announces Socceroos 26-man World Cup squad with Boyle missing out
item.description: Australia’s Socceroos coach, Tony Popovic, has named his final 26-man squad for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, with some tough decisions along the way. Veteran forward Martin Boyle, who qualifies for Austra...

item.title: Trump appoints Tom Barrack to Middle East envoy role amid criticism over past associations
item.description: Former President Donald Trump is encountering criticism from within his MAGA base after appointing Tom Barrack, a longtime friend and fundraiser previously charged and acquitted of acting as an unregi...

item.title: U.S. closes loophole allowing Nvidia AI chips to reach Chinese subsidiaries abroad
item.description: The U.S. Department of Commerce has issued new guidance to prevent companies from exporting advanced Nvidia and AMD AI chips to Chinese entities, even if they are located outside China. This measure c...

item.title: Food and Beverage Companies Urge Government to Ease Taxes and Support Industry Growth
item.description: The Association of Food, Beverage, and Tobacco Employers (AFBTE) don raise alarm say government dey scatter plenty taxes and arbitrary levies for food and beverage sector, wey fit affect survival of c...

item.title: Olawepo-Hashim secures Accord Party presidential ticket for 2027
item.description: Dr. Gbenga Olawepo-Hashim has been confirmed as the Accord Party’s presidential candidate for the 2027 general election after the party completed its affirmation process across several states. The exe...

item.title: How group dynamics make anger spread and intensify in crowds and online communities
item.description: The article explores how anger can spread rapidly within crowds and group settings, transforming individual behaviour in ways that would be unlikely in isolation. It opens with the author’s personal e...

item.title: Kevin Hassett faces criticism after comments on credit card delinquencies in Fox News interview
item.description: Kevin Hassett, director of the U.S. National Economic Council, drew widespread criticism following remarks he made during a Fox News Sunday interview regarding the financial condition of American hous...

item.title: How Parity Shapes the NHL Stanley Cup Final
item.description: The Stanley Cup final this year features the Carolina Hurricanes facing off against the Vegas Golden Knights. While the matchup itself is solid, it lacks the star power and widespread excitement seen ...
